name: SYS 03 — Contract Generation
description: Webhook on Contract Sent: Claude generates Exhibit A scope summary → fixed MSA-style HTML/PDF → html2pdf → Drive upload → Contracts sheet queue (Pending Review) → Chat alert → poll until Approved → client email + HubSpot contract_sent_date + Log. Not legal advice; e-sign is out of scope.

parameters.content:
## SYS 03 — Contract Generation

### Purpose
Generate a **Master Services Agreement (MSA) PDF** when a deal enters **Contract Sent**: AI-written **Exhibit A — Statement of Work summary** plus **fixed** commercial terms (fees from deal/tier, signatures). Same human-in-the-loop pattern as SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery (**Contracts** tab in the master sheet).

### What this workflow does *not* do
It does **not** provide legal advice or replace attorney review. It does **not** run e-signature (use DocuSign, HubSpot quotes, or similar after the PDF is approved). Requires **`client_drive_folder_id`** on the deal for upload (same as SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery).

### When it fires
- **Webhook:** `POST` → `/webhook/hubspot-deal-contract-sent`
- **HubSpot:** Deal enters **Contract Sent** (direct workflow, or **SYS 00** router on `dealstage`).

### Dependencies
CONFIG, Anthropic, Google Drive & Sheets, Send Email, Send Google Chat Alert, Log sub-workflows. Add a **Contracts** tab to the master sheet (see `docs/google-sheets-setup.md`). Create deal property **`contract_sent_date`** (see `docs/hubspot-setup.md`).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: $json.maxTokens, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

value.Drive Link: ={{ $('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.id ? 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/' + $('Upload to Drive').first().json.id : ($('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.data?.id ? 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/' + $('Upload to Drive').first().json.data.id : '') }}
